title: Arcade
scope: A small arcade of self-contained canvas/WebGL games — Wardenfall (tower defense), Aeldrift (3D exploration), Spinhazard (vector shooter), and Solitaire (Klondike, with per-user save/resume) — sharing one high-score board. Demonstrates the platform's in-browser game capability. NOT a competitive/online game service; these are local single-player diversions.

specs.title: Play the games
specs.behavior: The arcade offers four self-contained in-browser games (Wardenfall tower defense, Aeldrift 3D exploration, Spinhazard vector shooter, Solitaire with per-user save/resume) rendered on canvas/WebGL.

specs.title: High-score board
specs.behavior: The high-score board shows the shared leaderboard across the arcade games.
